HGSS.502.0000:
I wanted PORYGON, but I was short
by 100 Coins...
HGSS.502.0001:
Whew...\f
I’ve got to stay calm and collected...\f
I can’t lose my cool.
If I spend all my time playing here,\r
I could get in trouble at home.
HGSS.502.0002:
I woke up and realized my potential!\f
So, what potential was woken in me?
What’s my hidden power, you ask?\f
It’s a power that lets me see the
Hidden Power of a Pokémon.\f
When they learn that move, I can tell
what type the move will be.\f
So, want me to use my hidden power?\f
I’ll tell you what type your
Pokémon’s Hidden Power will be. [0200,0000]
HGSS.502.0003:
I’ll tell you what type your Pokémon’s
Hidden Power will be.\f
My own hidden power lets me
do that. [0200,0000]
HGSS.502.0004:
If this Pokémon were to learn
Hidden Power, the move’s type\r
would be [010F,0000,0000].
HGSS.502.0005:
This Pokémon’s Hidden Power is the
[010F,0000,0000] type.
HGSS.502.0006:
If you want to know, ask me, and I’ll
activate my hidden power for you.
HGSS.502.0007:
A move that an Egg can learn?!
That’s flat-out impossible.
HGSS.502.0008:
Oh, no. This Pokémon can’t learn the
move Hidden Power in the first place.
HGSS.502.0009:
Welcome!\f
We exchange your game coins for
fabulous prizes! [0200,0000]
HGSS.502.0010:
OK. Please save your coins and
come again!
HGSS.502.0014: Sorry. You can’t carry any more.\f
HGSS.502.0015:
Your party’s full!
Please make some room\r
before you come back.
HGSS.502.0018:
Welcome!\f
We exchange your coins for
fabulous prizes! [0200,0000]
